## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Scientific motivation

Explain why the change is necessary for SLAM, sensor fusion, uncertainty estimation, benchmarking, or research reproducibility.

## Mathematical / algorithmic notes

Document the formulation, assumptions, numerical stability considerations, and limitations. Link to `docs/` updates when applicable.

## Engineering notes

Describe modularity, interfaces, configuration changes, and backward compatibility.

## Evidence

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Smoke experiment run
- [ ] Benchmark config committed
- [ ] Metrics/figures generated by scripts
- [ ] No unsupported benchmark claims added

## Reproduction command

```bash
# paste exact command(s)
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is formatted
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Large generated files are excluded
- [ ] Limitations are stated honestly
